overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront promenade in Night City. The camera moves from a canal-side wooden deck, passes under an industrial bridge, and continues along a neon-lit pedestrian walkway lined with palm trees and digital billboards including the iconic 'CAN'T BREATHE' advertisement, before moving through a crowd of dancing NPCs.

events.description: ascending stairs from water level up to main promenade height

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden deck beside the canal, approaching the metal bridge structure

entered.detail: wooden plank walkway running alongside the water
dark water with reflections of surrounding industrial structures
large industrial bridge spanning the canal with concrete supports
vertical concrete wall lining the far side of the canal

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at water level on a wooden deck alongside a canal in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward toward a large metal bridge, with industrial concrete pillars visible across the water. The area is devoid of pedestrians, focusing on the industrial waterfront architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered promenade under transit bridge with neon signage

events.description: moving from open waterfront into covered area beneath the bridge structure
emerging from shadow of bridge into sunlit area with vibrant neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking under the bridge structure along the promenade, passing seated individuals on the right

notable_agents.action: person sitting on steps near the water's edge

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'CAN'T BREATHE' text with smoke effects
digital advertisement showing a character in red with 'ALL FOODS' text
overhead bridge structure with metal railings casting shadows below
building facade with cyan and purple neon strip lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a large bridge structure into a semi-covered promenade area. Neon signs become visible including the prominent 'CAN'T BREATHE' billboard. The lighting shifts from shadow to bright sunlight as the camera emerges from under the bridge, revealing palm trees and futuristic buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with digital advertising

events.description: slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the promenade

agents.ego_description: walking along the open promenade passing palm trees and large digital advertisements, approaching a crowd

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: tall curved glass towers reflecting the morning sunlight
line of palm trees along the promenade edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide promenade lined with palm trees and towering glass skyscrapers. The 'CAN'T BREATHE' billboard remains visible to the left while the camera moves toward a gathering of people ahead. The area is bathed in bright morning sunlight with long shadows cast across the wooden deck.

events.description: entering area with group of NPCs dancing and socializing in the plaza
weaving through the dense crowd of dancing pedestrians

agents.ego_description: moving through a dense crowd of NPCs who are dancing and socializing in the open plaza

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs dancing in a circle formation
NPC in white outfit performing dance moves

entered.detail: large advertisement showing a robotic hand with 'DYNALAR' text
digital sign displaying 'WE CAN HELP' with a man's portrait
yellow seating benches along the promenade edge

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a crowded plaza area where numerous NPCs are gathered and dancing. The ground surface changes to paved tiles. Large digital billboards for 'DYNALAR' and medical services line the walkway. The crowd density increases significantly as the camera weaves through dancing characters.

scene_state.functional_zone: promenade with seating and advertising displays

events.description: passing close to large billboard temporarily filling left side of frame

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade past benches with seated NPCs and large advertisements

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a bench conversing

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a quieter section of the promenade with fewer pedestrians. The camera passes yellow benches where NPCs are seated. The DYNALAR billboard moves from right to left in the frame as the camera progresses, while the medical billboard becomes more central. The elevated transit structure remains visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate industrial waterfront into a vibrant, neon-lit urban promenade. It begins at water level on a wooden deck alongside a canal, gliding forward toward the massive concrete pillars of a metal bridge. As the camera passes under the heavy bridge structure, the environment shifts into a semi-covered walkway where glowing neon signs and a prominent 'CAN'T BREATHE' billboard first emerge from the shadows. The scene then opens into bright sunlight as the camera clears the bridge, revealing a futuristic cityscape lined with palm trees and towering buildings.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic promenade that transitions from a sunlit open walkway into a dense, dancing crowd before settling into a quieter urban stretch. It begins on a wooden deck lined with palm trees and towering glass skyscrapers, moving past a prominent CAN'T BREATHE billboard under the bright morning sun. As the camera advances, the wooden surface shifts to paved tiles and the environment becomes increasingly crowded, weaving through a gathering of dancing NPCs beneath large digital advertisements for DYNALAR and medical services. The scene then opens up into a more tranquil section of the promenade, passing yellow benches where pedestrians sit in repose. Finally, the camera glides forward as the DYNALAR billboard slides across the frame and the elevated transit structure looms in the background.
